goal: create a gui app with python and test it

5615ff75.name: Sprint Goal
5615ff75.description: create a gui app with python and test it

a2dea195.name: GUI Logic Implementation
a2dea195.description: Handles the core layout and interaction logic of the Tkinter-based GUI window. Contains class TaskApp with: __init__(self, root: tk.Tk) -> None, handle_click(self, event: tk.Event) -> None, update_display(self, text: str) -> None. Holds self.root: tk.Tk, self.label: tk.Label, self.button: tk.Button. Imports tkinter as tk and interacts with the Controller class. This file is the entry point for the window rendering and event binding.

2593c3ab.name: Application Logic Controller
2593c3ab.description: Orchestrates the data flow between the GUI and internal state. Contains class Controller with: __init__(self) -> None, process_action(self, action_id: str) -> bool, get_status(self) -> str. Holds self.status: str, self.history: list[str]. Imports logging and state components. This coordinates the internal business logic separately from the visual rendering.

d1ab4c17.name: GUI Unit Testing
d1ab4c17.description: Defines test suites for validating GUI responsiveness and logic. Contains class TestApp with: setUp(self) -> None, test_button_interaction(self) -> None, test_label_update(self) -> None. Imports unittest, tkinter as tk, and the App class from src/gui/app.py. Validates the UI state changes without requiring manual user interaction.

c7f2e946.name: Execution Entry Point
c7f2e946.description: Bootstraps the application environment and launches the main event loop. Defines module-level function run_app() -> None. Imports tk from tkinter and TaskApp from src/gui/app.py. Ensures the application starts with proper configuration and cleans up after the main loop terminates.
